emails.subject: Nov Capacity
emails.body: Nov Capacity I checked the CGLF and CGAS capacity against Navigator. Take a look and let me know what you think. Also, do you know the demand charges for the CGAS items highlighted in purple?

emails.subject: Re: Nov Capacity
emails.body: Re: Nov Capacity That looks like them. Here's the rates(demand Charges) 68915-$5.171 68916-$5.18 68917-$5.1807 68918-$5.171 69148-$5.171 69149-$5.18 You also had 1,600/d on your 10/19 capacity email (Toledo to Sandusky) Contract#?; should be at $5.171.
